example_en: The journey from Beijing to Shanghai takes about five hours by train.
example_cn: 从北京到上海的旅程乘火车大约需要五个小时。

example_en: Our class is planning a trip to the science museum next Friday.
example_cn: 我们班正在计划下周五去科学博物馆的出行。

example_en: Where are you going for the summer holiday this year?
example_cn: 今年暑假你打算去哪里？

example_en: My family went to Hainan Island for a wonderful vacation.
example_cn: 我们一家人去了海南岛度过了一个美好的假期。

example_en: We booked a hotel room near the airport for one night.
example_cn: 我们在机场附近订了一晚的酒店房间。

example_en: The airport was very crowded during the Spring Festival travel rush.
example_cn: 春运期间机场非常拥挤。

example_en: I'll meet you at the train station at three o'clock.
example_cn: 我三点钟会在火车站接你。

example_en: Students can buy train tickets at half price with their ID cards.
example_cn: 学生凭身份证可以买半价火车票。

example_en: All passengers must fasten their seat belts before take-off.
example_cn: 所有乘客在起飞前必须系好安全带。

example_en: The flight from London to Beijing takes about ten hours.
example_cn: 从伦敦到北京的航班大约需要十个小时。

example_en: The high-speed train can reach a speed of 350 kilometres per hour.
example_cn: 高速列车时速可达350公里。

example_en: Taking a plane is the fastest way to travel between cities far apart.
example_cn: 乘飞机是远距离城市间最快的旅行方式。

example_en: We took a ship to visit the islands along the coast.
example_cn: 我们乘船游览了沿海的岛屿。

example_en: Riding a bicycle is a good way to exercise and protect the environment.
example_cn: 骑自行车是锻炼和保护环境的好方法。

example_en: Driving a car requires a lot of practice and concentration.
example_cn: 开车需要大量的练习和注意力集中。

example_en: Beijing is an international city that attracts tourists from all over the world.
example_cn: 北京是一座国际化的城市，吸引着来自世界各地的游客。

example_en: Studying abroad was a wonderful experience that changed my life.
example_cn: 出国留学是一次改变我人生的美妙经历。

example_en: More and more Chinese students choose to study abroad every year.
example_cn: 每年有越来越多的中国学生选择出国留学。

example_en: Learning about a country's culture helps you understand its people better.
example_cn: 了解一个国家的文化有助于你更好地理解那里的人们。

chinese: 历史上著名的；有历史意义的
example_en: The Great Wall is one of the most historic sites in the world.
example_cn: 长城是世界上最具有历史意义的遗址之一。

example_en: We joined a guided tour of the Forbidden City last weekend.
example_cn: 上周末我们参加了故宫的导游团游览。

example_en: We did an experiment in science class to see how plants grow.
example_cn: 我们在科学课上做了一个实验来观察植物如何生长。

example_en: The scientist spent ten years doing research on climate change.
example_cn: 这位科学家花了十年时间研究气候变化。

example_en: Many young people dream of becoming a scientist like Tu Youyou.
example_cn: 许多年轻人梦想成为像屠呦呦那样的科学家。

example_en: Students must follow safety rules when they work in the laboratory.
example_cn: 学生在实验室工作时必须遵守安全规定。

example_en: The discovery of penicillin changed the history of medicine.
example_cn: 青霉素的发现改变了医学史。

example_en: China has developed rapidly in the past forty years.
example_cn: 在过去的四十年里，中国迅速发展。

example_en: Modern technology makes our lives more convenient than ever before.
example_cn: 现代技术使我们的生活比以往任何时候都更方便。

example_en: We should try to use clean energy like solar and wind power.
example_cn: 我们应该尽量使用像太阳能和风能这样的清洁能源。

example_en: It is everyone's duty to protect the environment.
example_cn: 保护环境是每个人的责任。

example_en: Air pollution is a serious problem in many big cities.
example_cn: 空气污染是许多大城市的一个严重问题。

example_en: We should recycle paper, plastic, and glass to reduce waste.
example_cn: 我们应该回收纸张、塑料和玻璃以减少浪费。

example_en: We need to protect endangered animals from extinction.
example_cn: 我们需要保护濒危动物免于灭绝。

example_en: Spending time in nature helps me relax and feel peaceful.
example_cn: 在大自然中度过时光帮助我放松并感到平静。

example_en: This product is made from 100% natural ingredients.
example_cn: 这款产品由100%天然成分制成。

example_en: The nature reserve is home to many kinds of wildlife.
example_cn: 这个自然保护区是多种野生动物的家园。

example_en: Plastic waste in the ocean is a growing threat to sea animals.
example_cn: 海洋中的塑料垃圾对海洋动物构成了日益严重的威胁。

example_en: Forests cover about thirty percent of the Earth's land surface.
example_cn: 森林覆盖了地球陆地表面的大约百分之三十。

example_en: The climate in the south of China is warmer and wetter than in the north.
example_cn: 中国南方的气候比北方更温暖、更湿润。

example_en: The temperature dropped to minus ten degrees Celsius last night.
example_cn: 昨晚气温降到了零下十摄氏度。

example_en: Some chemical fertilizers can harm the soil and water.
example_cn: 有些化肥会损害土壤和水源。

example_en: There are over 400 species of birds in this national park.
example_cn: 这个国家公园里有超过400种鸟类。

example_en: Newton discovered gravity when an apple fell on his head.
example_cn: 牛顿在苹果砸到头时发现了万有引力。

example_en: Eating vegetables and exercising regularly are good for your health.
example_cn: 多吃蔬菜和定期锻炼对你的健康有益。

example_en: To stay healthy, you should eat a balanced diet and get enough sleep.
example_cn: 要保持健康，你应该均衡饮食并保证充足睡眠。

example_en: Doing exercise for thirty minutes every day can keep you fit.
example_cn: 每天锻炼三十分钟可以让你保持健康。

example_en: The doctor advised me to drink more water and get plenty of rest.
example_cn: 医生建议我多喝水并充分休息。

example_en: She was taken to the hospital because she had a high fever.
example_cn: 她因为发高烧被送到了医院。

example_en: Take this medicine three times a day after meals.
example_cn: 这种药一天三次，饭后服用。

example_en: The patient is recovering well after the operation.
example_cn: 病人手术后恢复得很好。

example_en: If you have a fever, you should stay in bed and drink warm water.
example_cn: 如果你发烧了，应该卧床休息并喝温水。

example_en: She has had a bad cough for a week and needs to see a doctor.
example_cn: 她已经咳嗽了一个星期，需要去看医生。

example_en: I had a headache yesterday because I stayed up too late.
example_cn: 我昨天因为熬夜太晚而头痛。

example_en: Eating too much spicy food can give you a stomach ache.
example_cn: 吃太多辛辣食物会让你胃痛。

example_en: After studying for three hours, you should take a short rest.
example_cn: 学习了三个小时后，你应该稍微休息一下。

example_en: Teenagers need at least eight to nine hours of sleep every night.
example_cn: 青少年每晚至少需要八到九个小时的睡眠。

example_en: Swimming is a great way to keep fit during the summer holidays.
example_cn: 游泳是暑假期间保持健康的好方法。

example_en: He lost five kilograms of weight after three months of exercise.
example_cn: 他锻炼了三个月后体重减了五公斤。

example_en: A balanced diet should include fruits, vegetables, grains, and protein.
example_cn: 均衡的饮食应该包括水果、蔬菜、谷物和蛋白质。

example_en: Milk is rich in nutrition and good for bone growth.
example_cn: 牛奶营养丰富，对骨骼生长有益。

example_en: Oranges contain a lot of vitamin C, which helps fight colds.
example_cn: 橙子富含维生素C，有助于对抗感冒。

example_en: It took him two weeks to recover from the flu.
example_cn: 他花了两周时间才从流感中恢复过来。

example_en: Regular exercise can help strengthen your immune system.
example_cn: 定期锻炼有助于增强你的免疫系统。

example_en: Education plays an important role in a person's life.
example_cn: 教育在一个人的一生中发挥着重要作用。

example_en: After high school, she plans to go to college to study medicine.
example_cn: 高中毕业后，她计划上大学学习医学。

example_en: Tsinghua University is one of the most famous universities in China.
example_cn: 清华大学是中国最著名的大学之一。

example_en: My favourite subject at school is English, followed by history.
example_cn: 在学校我最喜欢的科目是英语，其次是历史。

example_en: He chose computer science as his major in university.
example_cn: 他在大学选择了计算机科学作为主修专业。

example_en: The final exam will cover everything we learned this semester.
example_cn: 期末考试将涵盖我们本学期学过的所有内容。

example_en: She was pleased with the result of her hard work in the final exam.
example_cn: 她对期末考试中自己努力的结果感到满意。

example_en: Success comes from hard work, patience, and never giving up.
example_cn: 成功来自于努力、耐心和永不放弃。

example_en: If you keep trying, you will succeed in the end.
example_cn: 如果你不断尝试，最终你会成功的。

example_en: Don't be afraid to fail; every failure is a chance to learn.
example_cn: 不要害怕失败；每一次失败都是一次学习的机会。

example_en: She put a lot of effort into preparing for the English speech contest.
example_cn: 她为准备英语演讲比赛付出了很多努力。

example_en: Reading English books every day can help improve your vocabulary.
example_cn: 每天阅读英语书籍有助于提高你的词汇量。

example_en: You have made great progress in your writing this term.
example_cn: 这学期你在写作方面取得了很大的进步。

example_en: I want to become a teacher in the future because I love helping others.
example_cn: 我将来想成为一名老师，因为我喜欢帮助别人。

example_en: Choosing the right career is one of the most important decisions in life.
example_cn: 选择正确的职业是人生中最重要的决定之一。

example_en: My goal is to improve my English speaking skills by the end of this year.
example_cn: 我的目标是在今年年底前提高英语口语水平。

example_en: We are making a plan for our summer vacation trip to Xi'an.
example_cn: 我们正在为暑假去西安旅行制定计划。

example_en: It was a difficult decision, but she finally chose to study abroad.
example_cn: 这是一个艰难的决定，但她最终选择了出国留学。

example_en: Knowledge is powerful, and learning never ends.
example_cn: 知识就是力量，学无止境。

example_en: Studying hard gives you more opportunities in the future.
example_cn: 努力学习会给你未来带来更多机会。

example_en: Everyone should contribute to making our society a better place.
example_cn: 每个人都应该为让社会变得更美好做出贡献。

example_en: Our community organised a clean-up day to make the neighbourhood cleaner.
example_cn: 我们社区组织了一次清洁日，让社区更干净。

example_en: She works as a volunteer at the local library every Saturday.
example_cn: 她每周六在当地图书馆做志愿者。

example_en: The school raised a lot of money for charity through the book sale.
example_cn: 学校通过图书义卖为慈善机构筹集了很多钱。

example_en: My parents always support me in everything I do.
example_cn: 无论我做什么，我的父母总是支持我。

example_en: They made a donation to help children in poor areas go to school.
example_cn: 他们捐款帮助贫困地区的孩子上学。

example_en: We should respect our teachers, parents, and classmates.
example_cn: 我们应该尊重老师、父母和同学。

example_en: It is your responsibility to hand in your homework on time.
example_cn: 按时交作业是你的责任。

example_en: It is always best to be honest, even when it is difficult.
example_cn: 即使很难，诚实永远是最好的选择。

example_en: Trust is the foundation of any good relationship.
example_cn: 信任是任何良好关系的基础。

example_en: We should learn to value what we have and be grateful.
example_cn: 我们应该学会珍惜我们所拥有的并心怀感激。

example_en: This book belongs to the school library, so please return it on time.
example_cn: 这本书属于学校图书馆，请按时归还。

example_en: The World Health Organization works to improve health worldwide.
example_cn: 世界卫生组织致力于改善全球健康。

example_en: The school sports event is held once a year in October.
example_cn: 学校体育赛事每年十月举行一次。

example_en: We celebrate the Spring Festival with family reunions and delicious food.
example_cn: 我们以家庭团聚和美食来庆祝春节。

example_en: It is a tradition to eat mooncakes during the Mid-Autumn Festival.
example_cn: 中秋节吃月饼是一项传统。

example_en: In some countries, it is a custom to take off your shoes before entering a home.
example_cn: 在一些国家，进家门前脱鞋是一种风俗。

example_en: It's not fair that some students have more chances than others.
example_cn: 有些学生比其他人有更多机会，这是不公平的。

example_en: Everyone should have equal access to education regardless of their background.
example_cn: 无论背景如何，每个人都应享有平等的教育机会。

example_en: As a citizen, it is our duty to obey the law.
example_cn: 作为公民，遵守法律是我们的责任。

example_en: It is important to express your emotions in a healthy way.
example_cn: 以健康的方式表达你的情绪是很重要的。

example_en: I have a good feeling about the English exam tomorrow.
example_cn: 我对明天的英语考试有一种好的感觉。

example_en: Listening to music can help improve my mood when I feel down.
example_cn: 当我心情低落时，听音乐可以帮助改善我的情绪。

example_en: Try to control your anger and talk about the problem calmly.
example_cn: 试着控制你的愤怒，冷静地谈论问题。

example_en: The children were filled with joy when they saw the Christmas presents.
example_cn: 孩子们看到圣诞礼物时充满了喜悦。

example_en: She couldn't hide her sadness when her pet dog ran away.
example_cn: 当她的宠物狗跑掉时，她无法掩饰自己的悲伤。

example_en: Don't worry too much about the exam; just do your best.
example_cn: 不要太担心考试，尽力而为就好。

example_en: Too much stress can be bad for your health and study.
example_cn: 太多压力对你的健康和学习都不好。

example_en: She felt confident about her performance in the singing competition.
example_cn: 她对自己在歌唱比赛中的表现充满自信。

example_en: My parents are proud of me because I won the first prize.
example_cn: 我的父母为我感到自豪，因为我获得了一等奖。

example_en: He felt lonely after his best friend moved to another city.
example_cn: 在他最好的朋友搬到另一个城市后，他感到孤独。

example_en: True friendship means being there for each other through good times and bad.
example_cn: 真正的友谊意味着无论顺境还是逆境都相互支持。

example_en: Learning how to communicate well is an important life skill.
example_cn: 学会良好沟通是一项重要的生活技能。

example_en: A good relationship with your family is very important.
example_cn: 与家人保持良好的关系非常重要。

example_en: It is normal for friends to argue sometimes, but they should make up.
example_cn: 朋友之间有时争吵是正常的，但他们应该和好。

example_en: It takes courage to forgive someone who has hurt you.
example_cn: 原谅伤害过你的人需要勇气。

example_en: He made a sincere apology for what he had said.
example_cn: 他为自己说过的话做了真诚的道歉。

example_en: She is very generous and always shares her snacks with others.
example_cn: 她非常大方，总是和别人分享她的零食。

example_en: Learning a language takes time and patience.
example_cn: 学习一门语言需要时间和耐心。

example_en: Teachers should encourage students to ask questions and think independently.
example_cn: 老师应该鼓励学生提问并独立思考。

example_en: Social media plays a big role in how young people communicate today.
example_cn: 社交媒体在当今年轻人的交流方式中起着重要作用。

example_en: My grandfather still reads the newspaper every morning with his tea.
example_cn: 我爷爷仍然每天早晨边喝茶边看报纸。

example_en: The school magazine publishes articles written by students every month.
example_cn: 校刊每月发表学生写的文章。

example_en: The journalist conducted an interview with the famous scientist.
example_cn: 记者对这位著名科学家进行了采访。

example_en: The news report about environmental protection caught everyone's attention.
example_cn: 这则关于环境保护的新闻报道引起了大家的关注。

example_en: A good reporter should be honest, curious, and hard-working.
example_cn: 一个好记者应该诚实、好奇且勤奋。

example_en: The editor checked every article carefully before printing.
example_cn: 编辑在印刷前仔细检查了每一篇文章。

example_en: I read an interesting article about space exploration in today's newspaper.
example_cn: 我在今天的报纸上读到一篇关于太空探索的有趣文章。

example_en: I sent a message to my friend to confirm our meeting time.
example_cn: 我给朋友发了一条消息以确认我们的见面时间。

example_en: The Internet allows us to connect with people from all over the world.
example_cn: 互联网使我们能够与世界各地的人们联系。

example_en: The school website has all the information about courses and activities.
example_cn: 学校网站上有关于课程和活动的所有信息。

example_en: Social media platforms help us stay in touch with old friends.
example_cn: 社交媒体平台帮助我们与老朋友保持联系。

example_en: You can upload your photos to the class album for everyone to see.
example_cn: 你可以把你的照片上传到班级相册，供大家查看。

example_en: You need to download the app before you can use it.
example_cn: 你需要先下载这个应用程序才能使用它。

example_en: Many students take online courses to learn new skills.
example_cn: 许多学生通过在线课程学习新技能。

example_en: Please leave a comment below and share your thoughts on this topic.
example_cn: 请在下方留言，分享你对这个话题的看法。

example_en: A good teacher can have a positive influence on students' lives.
example_cn: 一个好老师可以对学生的一生产生积极的影响。

example_en: We climbed the mountain and enjoyed the beautiful view from the top.
example_cn: 我们爬上了山，从山顶欣赏了美丽的景色。

example_en: The Yangtze River is the longest river in China.
example_cn: 长江是中国最长的河流。

example_en: The lake is so clear that you can see the fish swimming in it.
example_cn: 湖水如此清澈，你可以看到鱼在里面游动。

example_en: Hainan is a popular island where many people go for winter vacation.
example_cn: 海南是一个热门岛屿，很多人去那里过寒假。

example_en: The Gobi Desert is one of the largest deserts in Asia.
example_cn: 戈壁沙漠是亚洲最大的沙漠之一。

example_en: The weather forecast says it will be sunny and warm tomorrow.
example_cn: 天气预报说明天天气晴朗温暖。

example_en: The storm caused serious damage to the crops in the village.
example_cn: 暴风雨对村里的庄稼造成了严重破坏。

example_en: Heavy rain led to floods in several parts of the city.
example_cn: 暴雨导致城市多个地区发生洪灾。

example_en: People should stay calm and follow safety instructions during an earthquake.
example_cn: 地震时人们应保持冷静并遵循安全指示。

example_en: Natural disasters like earthquakes and floods can cause great loss.
example_cn: 地震和洪水等自然灾害会造成巨大损失。

example_en: Water is essential for human survival in a desert environment.
example_cn: 在沙漠环境中，水对人类生存至关重要。

example_en: We can reduce waste by using reusable bags instead of plastic ones.
example_cn: 我们可以通过使用可重复使用的袋子代替塑料袋来减少浪费。

example_en: We can reuse glass bottles instead of throwing them away.
example_cn: 我们可以重复使用玻璃瓶，而不是把它们扔掉。

example_en: Water is a precious resource that we must not waste.
example_cn: 水是一种宝贵的资源，我们绝不能浪费。

example_en: Solar panels convert sunlight into electricity for homes.
example_cn: 太阳能电池板将阳光转化为家庭用电。

example_en: Wind power is a clean and renewable source of energy.
example_cn: 风能是一种清洁可再生的能源。

example_en: Trees produce oxygen and help keep the air clean.
example_cn: 树木产生氧气，有助于保持空气清新。

example_en: The Earth's atmosphere protects us from harmful solar radiation.
example_cn: 地球的大气层保护我们免受有害太阳辐射。

example_en: Many species are in danger of extinction because of human activities.
example_cn: 由于人类活动，许多物种面临灭绝的危险。

example_en: Carbon dioxide is one of the main greenhouse gases.
example_cn: 二氧化碳是主要的温室气体之一。

example_en: Renewable energy sources like wind and solar are better for the planet.
example_cn: 风能和太阳能等可再生能源对地球更有利。

example_en: Coral reefs are home to a rich and diverse ecosystem.
example_cn: 珊瑚礁是丰富多样的生态系统的家园。

example_en: Although it was raining, they still went to the park for a walk.
example_cn: 虽然下着雨，他们还是去公园散步了。

example_en: He didn't study for the test; therefore, he failed it.
example_cn: 他没有为考试学习，因此没通过。

example_en: The weather was cold. However, we still enjoyed the trip.
example_cn: 天气很冷。不过，我们仍然享受这次旅行。

example_en: You won't pass the exam unless you work hard.
example_cn: 除非你努力学习，否则你不会通过考试。

example_en: I'm not sure whether I can go to the party or not.
example_cn: 我不确定我是否能去参加聚会。

example_en: Besides English, she can also speak French and Japanese.
example_cn: 除了英语，她还会说法语和日语。

example_en: You should leave now, otherwise you'll miss the bus.
example_cn: 你现在应该出发了，否则你会赶不上公交车。

example_en: Mother was cooking dinner; meanwhile, I was doing my homework.
example_cn: 妈妈在做晚饭，与此同时，我在做作业。

example_en: He forgot to set the alarm; consequently, he was late for school.
example_cn: 他忘了设闹钟，结果上学迟到了。

example_en: The phone is expensive; furthermore, it breaks easily.
example_cn: 这部手机很贵，而且很容易坏。

example_en: The task was difficult; nevertheless, she completed it on time.
example_cn: 任务很困难，尽管如此，她还是按时完成了。

example_en: The restaurant has good food; moreover, the service is excellent.
example_cn: 这家餐厅的食物很好，而且服务也很棒。

example_en: The match was cancelled due to the heavy rain.
example_cn: 比赛因大雨取消了。

example_en: One advantage of living in a big city is the convenient public transport.
example_cn: 住在大城市的一个优势是便利的公共交通。

example_en: The disadvantage of this plan is that it costs too much money.
example_cn: 这个计划的缺点是花费太多钱。

example_en: This discovery had a significant impact on medical science.
example_cn: 这一发现对医学科学产生了重大影响。

example_en: It is necessary to practice English every day if you want to improve.
example_cn: 如果你想提高英语水平，每天练习是必要的。

example_en: It was obvious that he was nervous because his hands were shaking.
example_cn: 很明显他很紧张，因为他的手在颤抖。

example_en: I prefer reading books to watching TV in my free time.
example_cn: 在空闲时间，我更喜欢读书而不是看电视。

example_en: I expect that the results will be announced next week.
example_cn: 我预计结果将在下周公布。

example_en: You should consider all the options before making a decision.
example_cn: 在做决定之前，你应该考虑所有选项。

example_en: She worked hard to achieve her dream of becoming a doctor.
example_cn: 她努力工作以实现成为医生的梦想。

example_en: The new library books will be available for students next Monday.
example_cn: 新图书馆的书将于下周一向学生开放借阅。

example_en: We need to find a new approach to solve this problem.
example_cn: 我们需要找到解决这个问题的新方法。

example_en: Regular exercise brings many benefits to both body and mind.
example_cn: 定期锻炼对身心都有许多好处。

example_en: Learning a new language is a challenge, but it is also rewarding.
example_cn: 学习一门新语言是一个挑战，但也是值得的。

example_en: English is the most common language used on the Internet.
example_cn: 英语是互联网上最常用的语言。

example_en: It is interesting to compare the customs of different countries.
example_cn: 比较不同国家的风俗习惯很有趣。

example_en: It is hard to concentrate on studying when the room is noisy.
example_cn: 房间嘈杂时很难集中注意力学习。

example_en: Children are naturally curious about the world around them.
example_cn: 孩子天生对周围的世界充满好奇。

example_en: Teenagers should learn to be independent and take care of themselves.
example_cn: 青少年应该学会独立并照顾自己。

example_en: Dragon boat racing is a traditional Chinese sport during the Dragon Boat Festival.
example_cn: 赛龙舟是端午节期间一项中国传统运动。

example_en: There are various after-school activities for students to choose from.
example_cn: 有各种各样的课外活动供学生选择。

example_en: My study schedule includes two hours of homework and thirty minutes of reading every day.
example_cn: 我的学习计划包括每天两小时的家庭作业和三十分钟的阅读。

example_en: We must finish this project before the deadline next Friday.
example_cn: 我们必须在截止日期（下周五）之前完成这个项目。

example_en: We spent the whole week preparing for the English speech contest.
example_cn: 我们花了整整一周时间准备英语演讲比赛。

example_en: Each student has to give a five-minute presentation in class.
example_cn: 每个学生都要在课堂上做一个五分钟的展示。

example_en: We had a lively discussion about the best way to protect the environment.
example_cn: 我们就保护环境的最佳方式进行了热烈的讨论。

example_en: In my opinion, reading is the best way to improve your writing skills.
example_cn: 在我看来，阅读是提高写作技能的最好方法。

example_en: We need to find a solution to the problem of plastic pollution.
example_cn: 我们需要找到解决塑料污染问题的方法。

example_en: She has the ability to solve difficult maths problems quickly.
example_cn: 她有快速解决数学难题的能力。

example_en: The school organises many after-class activities for students.
example_cn: 学校为学生组织了许多课外活动。

example_en: All students are required to attend the school meeting tomorrow.
example_cn: 所有学生都必须出席明天的校会。

example_en: She won first prize in the English speech competition last month.
example_cn: 她在上个月的英语演讲比赛中获得了一等奖。

example_en: I go to the library every Wednesday to borrow new books.
example_cn: 我每周三去图书馆借新书。

example_en: There are four students in our dormitory, and we get along very well.
example_cn: 我们宿舍有四名学生，大家相处得很好。

example_en: The campus of our school is beautiful, with many trees and flowers.
example_cn: 我们学校的校园很漂亮，有许多树木和鲜花。

example_en: The history assignment is to write a report about the Ming Dynasty.
example_cn: 历史作业是写一篇关于明朝的报告。

example_en: Write a short summary of the article in your own words.
example_cn: 用你自己的话写出这篇文章的简短摘要。

example_en: Reading widely is the best way to build up your vocabulary.
example_cn: 广泛阅读是积累词汇量的最佳方法。

example_en: Watching English movies can help improve your pronunciation.
example_cn: 看英语电影有助于改善你的发音。

example_en: Understanding grammar rules helps you write more correctly.
example_cn: 理解语法规则有助于你写得更正确。

example_en: Can you translate this sentence from Chinese into English?
example_cn: 你能把这个句子从中文翻译成英文吗？

example_en: You need a passport to travel to most foreign countries.
example_cn: 去大多数外国旅行都需要护照。

example_en: Our holiday destination this year is a small village in Yunnan.
example_cn: 我们今年的度假目的地是云南的一个小村庄。

example_en: The tour guide showed us around the Palace Museum.
example_cn: 导游带我们参观了故宫博物院。

example_en: Please make sure your luggage is labelled with your name and address.
example_cn: 请确保你的行李上标有姓名和地址。

example_en: The flight was delayed by two hours because of the bad weather.
example_cn: 航班因恶劣天气延误了两个小时。

example_en: We learned about Darwin's theory of evolution in biology class.
example_cn: 我们在生物课上学习了达尔文的进化论。

example_en: Scientists observe the behaviour of animals to learn more about them.
example_cn: 科学家观察动物的行为以进一步了解它们。

example_en: The research data showed that recycling rates have increased.
example_cn: 研究数据显示回收率有所提高。

example_en: The invention of the Internet changed the world completely.
example_cn: 互联网的发明彻底改变了世界。

example_en: We need to analyse the problem carefully before making a decision.
example_cn: 在做决定之前，我们需要仔细分析问题。

example_en: Common symptoms of a cold include a runny nose and a sore throat.
example_cn: 感冒的常见症状包括流鼻涕和喉咙痛。

example_en: The doctor recommended a new treatment for his back pain.
example_cn: 医生为他的背痛推荐了一种新的治疗方法。

example_en: The doctor examined my throat and said it was nothing serious.
example_cn: 医生检查了我的喉咙，说没什么大问题。

chinese: 精力充沛的；充满活力的
example_en: Doing morning exercise makes me feel energetic for the whole day.
example_cn: 做早操让我一整天都感到精力充沛。

example_en: A balanced diet is important for teenagers' growth and development.
example_cn: 均衡饮食对青少年的成长发育很重要。

example_en: Everyone should have the right to justice and fair treatment.
example_cn: 每个人都应该有权利获得公正和公平的对待。

example_en: We are lucky to live in a country with freedom of speech.
example_cn: 我们很幸运生活在一个有言论自由的国家。

example_en: Many people donate money to help victims of natural disasters.
example_cn: 许多人捐款帮助自然灾害的受害者。

example_en: The organisation works for the welfare of children in poor communities.
example_cn: 这个组织致力于贫困社区儿童的福利。

example_en: We should be environmentally conscious and reduce our waste.
example_cn: 我们应该有环保意识，减少垃圾产生。

example_en: Talking to someone about your anxiety can make you feel better.
example_cn: 和别人谈论你的焦虑可以让你感觉好一些。

example_en: She expressed her gratitude to everyone who helped her.
example_cn: 她向所有帮助过她的人表达了感激之情。

example_en: I always feel nervous before giving a speech in front of the class.
example_cn: 在全班面前演讲之前，我总是感到紧张。

example_en: We should show sympathy for people who are less fortunate than us.
example_cn: 我们应该同情那些不如我们幸运的人。

example_en: Take a deep breath and try to stay calm when you feel stressed.
example_cn: 感到有压力时深呼吸，努力保持冷静。

example_en: The news broadcast reported the latest developments in space exploration.
example_cn: 新闻广播报道了太空探索的最新进展。

example_en: The social network allows us to connect with friends around the world.
example_cn: 社交网络使我们能够与全世界的朋友联系。

example_en: The school newspaper publishes new articles every Friday.
example_cn: 校报每周五发表新的文章。

example_en: Digital technology has changed the way we read, learn, and communicate.
example_cn: 数字技术改变了我们阅读、学习和交流的方式。

example_en: It is important to protect your privacy when using social media.
example_cn: 使用社交媒体时保护隐私很重要。

example_en: The volcano erupted after being quiet for two hundred years.
example_cn: 这座火山在沉寂了两百年后喷发了。

example_en: The village is located in a beautiful valley surrounded by mountains.
example_cn: 村庄坐落在一个群山环绕的美丽山谷中。

example_en: The long drought caused many crops to die in the fields.
example_cn: 长期的干旱导致田地里许多庄稼枯死。

example_en: The typhoon brought strong winds and heavy rain to the coastal city.
example_cn: 台风给沿海城市带来了强风和大雨。

example_en: Glaciers are melting faster because of global warming.
example_cn: 由于全球变暖，冰川正在加速融化。

example_en: Water is essential for all living things on Earth.
example_cn: 水对地球上所有生物都是必不可少的。

example_en: Taking the subway is a more efficient way to travel during rush hours.
example_cn: 在高峰时段乘地铁是一种更高效的出行方式。

example_en: Each person has a unique set of talents and abilities.
example_cn: 每个人都有独特的天赋和能力。

example_en: It is important to wear appropriate clothes for different occasions.
example_cn: 在不同场合穿合适的衣服很重要。

example_en: Everyone has the potential to achieve great things if they work hard.
example_cn: 每个人都有潜力通过努力工作取得伟大的成就。
